The Funding Process

From application to funding

A streamlined 5-step process designed for speed and transparency.

1

Application

Submit your loan package with required documents. Our team confirms receipt same day.

2

Underwriting

We review the deal, conduct due diligence, and evaluate the risk. We may request additional information.

3

Approval

Conditional approval is issued. You receive a term sheet outlining all loan parameters.

4

Closing

Final documents are prepared, executed, and funded. Our team coordinates every step.

5

Funding

Funds are disbursed and your project moves forward. As fast as 7–14 days from submission.

Ready to Move Forward?

Let's structure your deal

Submit your loan package or reach out directly to discuss your project with our principals.

About A&J Gulf Blvd Capital

Private Capital. Proven Execution.

A private lending group built by operators — principals who have owned, developed, and financed commercial real estate, golf courses, marinas, and resort properties firsthand.

Our Story

Depth that institutional lenders lack

A&J Gulf Blvd Capital is a private lending group providing flexible financing solutions for commercial real estate and construction projects throughout the United States.

Our principals and lending partners bring over 30 years of combined experience in lending, underwriting, development, title services, and real estate finance — giving us the depth to move quickly and structure deals that traditional lenders can't.

We are not a broker. We are a direct private lending group with capital partners ready to deploy. That distinction means faster decisions, greater flexibility, and a single point of contact from application through closing.

30+ Years Combined Experience

Our principals and lending partners bring deep expertise in real estate, construction, and lending.

Direct Access to Capital

We offer direct access to private capital — we move quickly and structure deals traditional lenders can't.

Fast, Flexible, Reliable

We pride ourselves on fast decisions, flexible underwriting, and reliable closings on every transaction.

Relationship Driven

We build long-term relationships by delivering honest advice and creative financing solutions tailored to each project.

Our Advantage

Why borrowers choose us

⚡

Speed — 7 to 14 days to close

No committee delays. Decisions are made by principals who understand the deal, not committees reading a memo.

📐

Flexibility — we underwrite the deal

Value-add, construction, transitional, and specialty assets all qualify. We look at the project, not just the borrower's FICO.

🔒

Certainty of execution

Conditional approvals issued upon review. No last-minute retrading or surprise conditions at closing.

🏌️

Operator experience

Principals have owned and operated golf courses, marinas, resorts, and commercial properties — we speak your language.

Proven Track Record

Leadership & Industry Recognition

Professional Achievements

The following accomplishments reflect my experience as an owner, developer, investor, and operator of golf courses, hospitality venues, and commercial real estate prior to founding A&J Gulf Blvd Capital. These accomplishments reflect my experience acquiring, developing, financing, operating, and successfully exiting complex real estate and hospitality investments — the foundation of our approach to commercial lending.

In the Spotlight

Press & media features

My golf course and facility portfolio hosted major productions, professional tours, and championship events.

Motion Picture

Brothers — Major Motion Picture

One of the golf courses I previously owned was selected as a filming location for the feature film Brothers, starring Josh Brolin, Peter Dinklage, Glenn Close, and Brendan Fraser.

Professional Tour

Forme Tour (PGA TOUR Canada)

Hosted the Forme Tour, the PGA TOUR Canada's U.S.-based tour during the 2021 season.

Championship

Georgia PGA Championship — Four Consecutive Years

Served as proud sponsor of the Georgia PGA Championship for four consecutive years, supporting professional golf throughout Georgia.

Industry Recognition

Golf Inc. Magazine

Was recognized by Golf Inc. Magazine as one of the industry's leading golf ownership and management professionals in 2021.

Featured Game

Snellville-opoly

My prior club, Country Club of Gwinnett, was selected as one of the featured landmarks in the official Snellville-opoly community edition.

Hospitality

1945 Restaurant

Developed and built 1945 Restaurant, a destination dining venue adjacent to one of my championship golf course properties.

Industry awards & honors

Recognized for leadership, growth, and entrepreneurship across the Latin American business community.

Lending Matrix — Current as of May 2025

Loan Programs & Rate Sheet

Competitive private lending rates across six core loan programs. Rates are subject to underwriting, property type, and sponsor strength.

Lending Matrix

Rate sheet & loan structure

Program Loan Amount Term Max LTV/LTC Rate Range Structure
Commercial Acquisition $500K – $20M+ 12–36 months Up to 75% LTV 8.50% – 11.50% Interest Only
Construction Loans $1M – $20M+ 12–24 months Up to 80% LTC 9.50% – 12.50% Draw Schedule
Bridge Loans $500K – $20M+ 6–24 months Up to 75% LTV 8.00% – 14.00% Interest Only
Land Development $1M – $20M+ 12–36 months Up to 60% LTV 10.00% – 13.50% Interest Only
Value-Add Commercial $1M – $20M+ 12–36 months Up to 75% LTV 8.50% – 12.00% Interest Only
Multifamily Bridge $1M – $20M+ 12–36 months Up to 75% LTV 8.00% – 11.50% Interest Only

* Rates subject to underwriting, property type, market conditions, and sponsor strength. Subject to change without notice.

Credit Report (All Guarantors)

IRS Tax Returns — Last 2 Years (Business & Personal)

Specialty Asset Finance Division

Complex Assets Most Lenders Won't Touch

Our principals have direct ownership and operating experience in hospitality, recreational, and destination properties. We understand the revenue dynamics, seasonality, and capital needs of each property type.

Asset Classes

Specialty finance programs

Capital solutions for assets that fall outside the scope of conventional lenders.

⛳ Golf Course & Country Club Financing

  • Acquisition financing for golf courses, private clubs, and country clubs nationwide
  • Recapitalization — refinance existing debt, return equity, or fund capital reserves
  • Clubhouse renovations: dining, pro shop, event space, and facility upgrades
  • Course improvements: irrigation, cart paths, bunker renovation, tee box construction
  • Membership restructuring — bridge capital during membership drives or equity restructuring
  • Operational turnarounds — short-term capital for distressed or underperforming club assets

⚓ Marina & Resort Financing

  • Marina acquisitions and waterfront redevelopment
  • Dock expansions and dry stack storage
  • Fuel dock & service upgrades
  • Boutique hotel acquisition and destination resort financing
  • RV resort development and campground financing
  • Mixed-use waterfront projects

🏨 Destination Hospitality

  • Boutique hotels and inns — acquisition and renovation
  • Destination resort development and redevelopment
  • Resort property recapitalization
  • Hospitality redevelopment and conversion projects

🏕️ RV Resorts & Member Facilities

  • RV resort acquisition and development
  • Campground financing and expansion
  • Private clubs and member facility financing
  • Mixed-use resort community development
Why Our Specialty Division Is Different

We've sat in the operator's seat

The principals of A&J Gulf Blvd Capital have owned and operated multiple golf and country club properties. We understand membership revenue, food and beverage operations, maintenance requirements, and capital improvement planning.

For marina and resort assets, we bring direct experience evaluating seasonal revenue, slip income, dry stack operations, and hospitality RevPAR dynamics — with the precision that general commercial lenders simply cannot match.

Accurate Underwriting

We model revenue properly — including seasonality, membership dues, F&B, and slip income.

Faster Decisions

No learning curve. Our team understands the asset class before we open the file.

Creative Structure

We structure loans around the cash flow realities of specialty assets, not generic CRE templates.

Broker Partnership Program

We Protect and Reward Our Broker Relationships

We welcome mortgage brokers, investment bankers, commercial real estate professionals, and capital advisors. Your reputation and client relationships are your most valuable assets — we protect them.

Partnership Benefits

What we offer broker partners

🔒 Fee Protection

Your compensation is agreed upon upfront and protected all the way through closing. No surprises, no retrading.

💰 Competitive Referral Fees

Competitive referral opportunities available for all qualified transactions we close together.

⚡ Fast Term Sheets

We issue indicative terms quickly so you can keep your client informed and maintain momentum on the deal.

📞 Direct Lender Access

You communicate directly with our principals — no middlemen, no delays, no telephone tag with account managers.

🗺️ Nationwide Submissions

We accept submissions from licensed brokers in all 50 states across all major commercial property types.

👤 Dedicated Support

Assigned relationship manager for your submissions and pipeline. You always know where your deal stands.

Private Lending for Marinas & Waterfront Assets

Marina Financing

Growing a marina business is challenging — rising operating costs, capital-intensive repairs, and conventional lenders who simply don't understand waterfront assets. A&J Gulf Blvd Capital does.

Financing Solutions

Marina Loan Programs

We offer three powerful financing solutions for marina and waterfront asset owners — including government-backed programs that conventional lenders rarely offer.

Private Lending
⚓

Bridge & Acquisition Loans

Fast, flexible private capital for marina acquisitions, renovations, dock repairs, dry stack additions, or bridge financing. No government red tape — close in days, not months.

  • ✓ $500K – $20M+
  • ✓ Up to 75% LTV / 80% LTC
  • ✓ 6 – 36 month terms
  • ✓ Interest only payments
  • ✓ Close in 7 – 14 days
Government Backed
🏛️

USDA B&I Marina Loans

The USDA Business & Industry (B&I) program offers government-guaranteed loans for marinas in rural areas — with higher loan amounts, less collateral, and longer terms than conventional financing.

  • ✓ Up to $25 million
  • ✓ Up to 80% loan-to-value
  • ✓ Long repayment terms
  • ✓ Less collateral required
  • ✓ Rural marina locations
Government Backed
🏦

SBA 7(a) Marina Loans

SBA 7(a) loans are ideal for small marina owners — consolidate debt, fund working capital, and get financing with minimal equity injection requirements and no excessive rates.

  • ✓ Debt consolidation
  • ✓ Working capital eligible
  • ✓ Minimal equity injection
  • ✓ Competitive rates
  • ✓ Long loan terms
Why A&J Gulf Blvd Capital

We Understand Waterfront Assets.

As a specialty lender with direct experience in waterfront and hospitality properties, we evaluate marina deals the way an operator would — looking at slip revenue, dry stack capacity, fuel dock income, service revenue, and long-term market position.

Traditional banks often decline marina financing because they don't understand the asset class. We specialize in exactly these deals — and we close them fast.

Whether you need a private bridge loan, a government-backed USDA loan, or an SBA 7(a), our team will identify the right program and walk you through every step of the process.

🚢

Dock Repairs & Improvements

Fund capital-intensive dock repairs, floating dock systems, fuel dock upgrades, and marina infrastructure projects.

🏗️

Dry Stack Storage Additions

Expand your dry stack capacity with construction financing that follows the project draw schedule.

💼

Acquisition & Refinancing

Purchase a new marina or refinance existing debt with better terms and faster closings than conventional lenders.

Eligible Properties

Types of Marina Properties We Finance

We lend on all types of marina and waterfront assets across all 50 states.

⚓

Full-Service Marinas

Wet slip, dry storage, fuel dock, and service operations with multiple revenue streams.

🏖️

Waterfront Resorts

Destination properties combining marina operations with lodging and hospitality.

🛥️

Dry Stack Facilities

Standalone or attached dry stack storage facilities with proven occupancy rates.

⛽

Fuel Dock Operations

Marine fuel stations with consistent transient and slip-holder revenue.

🌊

Mixed-Use Waterfront

Commercial waterfront properties combining retail, dining, and marine services.

🏢

Boat Yards & Service Facilities

Marine service operations, boat yards, and repair facilities with real property collateral.

Common Questions

Marina Financing FAQ

What is the difference between a private loan and a USDA or SBA loan for a marina?

Private loans close in 7 to 14 days with flexible terms and minimal documentation requirements — ideal for acquisitions, bridge needs, or time-sensitive deals. USDA and SBA loans are government-backed, offer lower rates and longer terms, but require more documentation and take longer to process. We help you identify which program fits your situation best.

Who qualifies for a USDA B&I marina loan?

USDA Business & Industry loans are available to marinas located in rural areas as defined by the USDA. The program offers up to $25 million with up to 80% loan-to-value, less collateral than conventional loans, and longer repayment terms. We can quickly determine if your marina qualifies.

Can I get financing for a marina that a conventional bank turned down?

Yes. As a private direct lender specializing in waterfront and hospitality assets, we regularly finance deals that conventional banks decline. We evaluate the asset and its income potential — not just trailing financials or rigid credit box requirements.

What can marina financing be used for?

Marina financing can be used for acquisitions, refinancing existing debt, dock repairs and improvements, dry stack storage expansion, fuel dock upgrades, clubhouse construction, and working capital for operations.

Do you work with brokers on marina deals?

Absolutely. We have a dedicated broker program with fee protection from day one, fast term sheets, and direct access to our principals. Broker fees are agreed upon upfront and protected through closing on all 50 states.

Ready to Finance Your Marina?

Submit your deal today and receive a term sheet within 24 hours. Private, USDA, and SBA options available. No obligation, no fees to apply.

Private Lending for Golf & Country Clubs

Golf Course Financing

We have owned, operated, and sold golf courses — which means we underwrite golf and hospitality assets with a level of insight that traditional lenders simply cannot match. Fast closings, flexible terms, nationwide.
Request a Term Sheet Call +1 (727) 359-2495
Why A&J Gulf Blvd Capital

Operators First.
Lenders Second.

Our principals previously owned and operated five golf courses and country clubs across Georgia — including properties that hosted the Forme Tour (PGA Tour Canada), served as a filming location for a major motion picture, and were recognized by Golf Inc. Magazine.

We purchased one of those properties in 2019 and sold it in 2024 for four times the initial investment. That firsthand experience is exactly why we can underwrite golf and hospitality assets that traditional banks routinely pass on.

When you bring us a golf course deal, you're not explaining the business to a credit committee that's never stood on a fairway. You're talking to principals who have.

Quick Program Facts

Loan Amounts$1M – $20M+
Loan-to-ValueUp to 75% LTV
Loan-to-CostUp to 80% LTC
Loan Terms12 – 36 Months
Rate Range8.00% – 13.00%
Payment StructureInterest Only

Financing Solutions

Golf Course Loan Programs

We offer flexible private lending solutions for every stage of a golf course investment — from acquisition to renovation to bridge financing.

⛳

Acquisition Loans

Financing to purchase private, semi-private, or public golf courses. We move fast — often closing in 7 to 14 days when others take months.

  • ✓ Up to 75% LTV
  • ✓ $1M – $20M+
  • ✓ 12 – 36 month terms
🏗️

Renovation & Construction

Funding for course renovations, clubhouse upgrades, amenity additions, pool decks, dining facilities, or full ground-up construction.

  • ✓ Up to 80% LTC
  • ✓ Draw schedule available
  • ✓ 12 – 24 month terms
🔁

Bridge Loans

Short-term capital to stabilize operations, fund improvements ahead of a sale, or bridge the gap while transitioning to permanent financing.

  • ✓ Up to 75% LTV
  • ✓ 6 – 24 month terms
  • ✓ Interest only payments
Eligible Properties

Types of Golf Properties We Finance

We lend on all types of golf and country club assets across all 50 states.

🏌️

Private Golf Courses

Exclusive member-only clubs seeking acquisition or renovation capital.

🏡

Country Clubs

Full-service clubs with dining, tennis, fitness, and social amenities.

🌐

Semi-Private Courses

Hybrid models serving both members and daily-fee public players.

🎯

Public Golf Courses

Daily-fee courses with consistent patronage and revenue history.

🏢

Golf & Resort Properties

Destination resorts combining lodging, golf, and hospitality operations.

⛳

Driving Ranges & Practice Facilities

Standalone or attached practice facilities with proven revenue streams.

Common Questions

Golf Course Financing FAQ

What loan amounts are available for golf course financing?

We lend from $1 million up to $20 million and above. Loans are available for acquisition, renovation, bridge financing, and construction. We do not provide business-only financing — the loan must be secured by real property.

How quickly can you close a golf course loan?

We close in as fast as 7 to 14 days. As a private direct lender — not a broker — we control the process from term sheet to funding, which is how we move at a speed banks simply cannot match.

Do you lend on distressed or underperforming golf courses?

Yes. Unlike conventional lenders, we understand that a course's current financials may not reflect its true potential. We evaluate the asset, the market, and the business plan — not just trailing income. This is a key advantage of working with operators-turned-lenders.

What states do you lend in?

We lend in all 50 states. Golf course financing is available nationwide with no geographic restrictions.

Do you work with mortgage brokers on golf course deals?

Absolutely. We have a dedicated broker program with fee protection, fast term sheets, and direct access to our principals. Broker fees are agreed upon upfront and protected through closing.

Ready to Finance Your Golf Course?

Submit your deal today and receive a term sheet within 24 hours. No obligation, no fees to apply.

  • ✓ Working capital eligible
  • ✓ Minimal equity injection
  • ✓ Competitive rates
  • ✓ Long loan terms
Why A&J Gulf Blvd Capital

We Understand Waterfront Assets.

As a specialty lender with direct experience in waterfront and hospitality properties, we evaluate marina deals the way an operator would — looking at slip revenue, dry stack capacity, fuel dock income, service revenue, and long-term market position.

Traditional banks often decline marina financing because they don't understand the asset class. We specialize in exactly these deals — and we close them fast.

Whether you need a private bridge loan, a government-backed USDA loan, or an SBA 7(a), our team will identify the right program and walk you through every step of the process.

🚢

Dock Repairs & Improvements

Fund capital-intensive dock repairs, floating dock systems, fuel dock upgrades, and marina infrastructure projects.

🏗️

Dry Stack Storage Additions

Expand your dry stack capacity with construction financing that follows the project draw schedule.

💼

Acquisition & Refinancing

Purchase a new marina or refinance existing debt with better terms and faster closings than conventional lenders.

Eligible Properties

Types of Marina Properties We Finance

We lend on all types of marina and waterfront assets across all 50 states.

⚓

Full-Service Marinas

Wet slip, dry storage, fuel dock, and service operations with multiple revenue streams.

🏖️

Waterfront Resorts

Destination properties combining marina operations with lodging and hospitality.

🛥️

Dry Stack Facilities

Standalone or attached dry stack storage facilities with proven occupancy rates.

⛽

Fuel Dock Operations

Marine fuel stations with consistent transient and slip-holder revenue.

🌊

Mixed-Use Waterfront

Commercial waterfront properties combining retail, dining, and marine services.

🏢

Boat Yards & Service Facilities

Marine service operations, boat yards, and repair facilities with real property collateral.

Common Questions

Marina Financing FAQ

What is the difference between a private loan and a USDA or SBA loan for a marina?

Private loans close in 7 to 14 days with flexible terms and minimal documentation requirements — ideal for acquisitions, bridge needs, or time-sensitive deals. USDA and SBA loans are government-backed, offer lower rates and longer terms, but require more documentation and take longer to process. We help you identify which program fits your situation best.

Who qualifies for a USDA B&I marina loan?

USDA Business & Industry loans are available to marinas located in rural areas as defined by the USDA. The program offers up to $25 million with up to 80% loan-to-value, less collateral than conventional loans, and longer repayment terms. We can quickly determine if your marina qualifies.

Can I get financing for a marina that a conventional bank turned down?

Yes. As a private direct lender specializing in waterfront and hospitality assets, we regularly finance deals that conventional banks decline. We evaluate the asset and its income potential — not just trailing financials or rigid credit box requirements.

What can marina financing be used for?

Marina financing can be used for acquisitions, refinancing existing debt, dock repairs and improvements, dry stack storage expansion, fuel dock upgrades, clubhouse construction, and working capital for operations.

Do you work with brokers on marina deals?

Absolutely. We have a dedicated broker program with fee protection from day one, fast term sheets, and direct access to our principals. Broker fees are agreed upon upfront and protected through closing on all 50 states.

Ready to Finance Your Marina?

Submit your deal today and receive a term sheet within 24 hours. Private, USDA, and SBA options available. No obligation, no fees to apply.

Request a Term Sheet +1 (727) 359-2495
Private Lending for Golf & Country Clubs

Golf Course Financing

We have owned, operated, and sold golf courses — which means we underwrite golf and hospitality assets with a level of insight that traditional lenders simply cannot match. Fast closings, flexible terms, nationwide.
Request a Term Sheet Call +1 (727) 359-2495
Why A&J Gulf Blvd Capital

Operators First.
Lenders Second.

Our principals previously owned and operated five golf courses and country clubs across Georgia — including properties that hosted the Forme Tour (PGA Tour Canada), served as a filming location for a major motion picture, and were recognized by Golf Inc. Magazine.

We purchased one of those properties in 2019 and sold it in 2024 for four times the initial investment. That firsthand experience is exactly why we can underwrite golf and hospitality assets that traditional banks routinely pass on.

When you bring us a golf course deal, you're not explaining the business to a credit committee that's never stood on a fairway. You're talking to principals who have.

Quick Program Facts

Loan Amounts$1M – $20M+
Loan-to-ValueUp to 75% LTV
Loan-to-CostUp to 80% LTC
Loan Terms12 – 36 Months
Rate Range8.00% – 13.00%
Payment StructureInterest Only
Close Time7 – 14 Days
Financing Solutions

Golf Course Loan Programs

We offer flexible private lending solutions for every stage of a golf course investment — from acquisition to renovation to bridge financing.

⛳

Acquisition Loans

Financing to purchase private, semi-private, or public golf courses. We move fast — often closing in 7 to 14 days when others take months.

  • ✓ Up to 75% LTV
  • ✓ $1M – $20M+
  • ✓ 12 – 36 month terms
🏗️

Renovation & Construction

Funding for course renovations, clubhouse upgrades, amenity additions, pool decks, dining facilities, or full ground-up construction.

  • ✓ Up to 80% LTC
  • ✓ Draw schedule available
  • ✓ 12 – 24 month terms
🔁

Bridge Loans

Short-term capital to stabilize operations, fund improvements ahead of a sale, or bridge the gap while transitioning to permanent financing.

  • ✓ Up to 75% LTV
  • ✓ 6 – 24 month terms
  • ✓ Interest only payments
Eligible Properties

Types of Golf Properties We Finance

We lend on all types of golf and country club assets across all 50 states.

🏌️

Private Golf Courses

Exclusive member-only clubs seeking acquisition or renovation capital.

🏡

Country Clubs

Full-service clubs with dining, tennis, fitness, and social amenities.

🌐

Semi-Private Courses

Hybrid models serving both members and daily-fee public players.

🎯

Public Golf Courses

Daily-fee courses with consistent patronage and revenue history.

🏢

Golf & Resort Properties

Destination resorts combining lodging, golf, and hospitality operations.

⛳

Driving Ranges & Practice Facilities

Standalone or attached practice facilities with proven revenue streams.

$25B+
Annual U.S. golf course revenue
300K+
Jobs supported by golf courses nationwide
7–14
Days to close with A&J Gulf Blvd Capital
Common Questions

Golf Course Financing FAQ

What loan amounts are available for golf course financing?

We lend from $1 million up to $20 million and above. Loans are available for acquisition, renovation, bridge financing, and construction. We do not provide business-only financing — the loan must be secured by real property.

How quickly can you close a golf course loan?

We close in as fast as 7 to 14 days. As a private direct lender — not a broker — we control the process from term sheet to funding, which is how we move at a speed banks simply cannot match.

Do you lend on distressed or underperforming golf courses?

Yes. Unlike conventional lenders, we understand that a course's current financials may not reflect its true potential. We evaluate the asset, the market, and the business plan — not just trailing income. This is a key advantage of working with operators-turned-lenders.

What states do you lend in?

We lend in all 50 states. Golf course financing is available nationwide with no geographic restrictions.

Do you work with mortgage brokers on golf course deals?

Absolutely. We have a dedicated broker program with fee protection, fast term sheets, and direct access to our principals. Broker fees are agreed upon upfront and protected through closing.

Ready to Finance Your Golf Course?

Submit your deal today and receive a term sheet within 24 hours. No obligation, no fees to apply.

Request a Term Sheet +1 (727) 359-2495

Marina Financing

Growing a marina business is challenging — rising operating costs, capital-intensive repairs, and conventional lenders who simply don't understand waterfront assets. A&J Gulf Blvd Capital does.

Financing Solutions

Marina Loan Programs

We offer three powerful financing solutions for marina and waterfront asset owners — including government-backed programs that conventional lenders rarely offer.

Private Lending
⚓

Bridge & Acquisition Loans

Fast, flexible private capital for marina acquisitions, renovations, dock repairs, dry stack additions, or bridge financing. No government red tape — close in days, not months.

  • ✓ $500K – $20M+
  • ✓ Up to 75% LTV / 80% LTC
  • ✓ 6 – 36 month terms
  • ✓ Interest only payments
  • ✓ Close in 7 – 14 days
Government Backed
🏛️

USDA B&I Marina Loans

The USDA Business & Industry (B&I) program offers government-guaranteed loans for marinas in rural areas — with higher loan amounts, less collateral, and longer terms than conventional financing.

  • ✓ Up to $25 million
  • ✓ Up to 80% loan-to-value
  • ✓ Long repayment terms
  • ✓ Less collateral required
  • ✓ Rural marina locations
Government Backed
🏦

SBA 7(a) Marina Loans

SBA 7(a) loans are ideal for small marina owners — consolidate debt, fund working capital, and get financing with minimal equity injection requirements and no excessive rates.

  • ✓ Debt consolidation
  • ✓ Working capital eligible
  • ✓ Minimal equity injection
  • ✓ Competitive rates
  • ✓ Long loan terms
Why A&J Gulf Blvd Capital

We Understand Waterfront Assets.

As a specialty lender with direct experience in waterfront and hospitality properties, we evaluate marina deals the way an operator would — looking at slip revenue, dry stack capacity, fuel dock income, service revenue, and long-term market position.

Traditional banks often decline marina financing because they don't understand the asset class. We specialize in exactly these deals — and we close them fast.

Whether you need a private bridge loan, a government-backed USDA loan, or an SBA 7(a), our team will identify the right program and walk you through every step of the process.

Fund capital-intensive dock repairs, floating dock systems, fuel dock upgrades, and marina infrastructure projects.

What is the difference between a private loan and a USDA or SBA loan for a marina?

Private loans close in 7 to 14 days with flexible terms and minimal documentation requirements — ideal for acquisitions, bridge needs, or time-sensitive deals. USDA and SBA loans are government-backed, offer lower rates and longer terms, but require more documentation and take longer to process. We help you identify which program fits your situation best.

Who qualifies for a USDA B&I marina loan?

USDA Business & Industry loans are available to marinas located in rural areas as defined by the USDA. The program offers up to $25 million with up to 80% loan-to-value, less collateral than conventional loans, and longer repayment terms. We can quickly determine if your marina qualifies.

Can I get financing for a marina that a conventional bank turned down?

Yes. As a private direct lender specializing in waterfront and hospitality assets, we regularly finance deals that conventional banks decline. We evaluate the asset and its income potential — not just trailing financials or rigid credit box requirements.

What can marina financing be used for?

Marina financing can be used for acquisitions, refinancing existing debt, dock repairs and improvements, dry stack storage expansion, fuel dock upgrades, clubhouse construction, and working capital for operations.

Do you work with brokers on marina deals?

Absolutely. We have a dedicated broker program with fee protection from day one, fast term sheets, and direct access to our principals. Broker fees are agreed upon upfront and protected through closing on all 50 states.

Marine service operations, boat yards, and repair facilities with real property collateral.

Common Questions

Marina Financing FAQ

What is the difference between a private loan and a USDA or SBA loan for a marina?

Private loans close in 7 to 14 days with flexible terms and minimal documentation requirements — ideal for acquisitions, bridge needs, or time-sensitive deals. USDA and SBA loans are government-backed, offer lower rates and longer terms, but require more documentation and take longer to process. We help you identify which program fits your situation best.

Who qualifies for a USDA B&I marina loan?

USDA Business & Industry loans are available to marinas located in rural areas as defined by the USDA. The program offers up to $25 million with up to 80% loan-to-value, less collateral than conventional loans, and longer repayment terms. We can quickly determine if your marina qualifies.

Can I get financing for a marina that a conventional bank turned down?

Yes. As a private direct lender specializing in waterfront and hospitality assets, we regularly finance deals that conventional banks decline. We evaluate the asset and its income potential — not just trailing financials or rigid credit box requirements.

What can marina financing be used for?

Marina financing can be used for acquisitions, refinancing existing debt, dock repairs and improvements, dry stack storage expansion, fuel dock upgrades, clubhouse construction, and working capital for operations.

Do you work with brokers on marina deals?

Absolutely. We have a dedicated broker program with fee protection from day one, fast term sheets, and direct access to our principals. Broker fees are agreed upon upfront and protected through closing on all 50 states.

Ready to Finance Your Marina?

Submit your deal today and receive a term sheet within 24 hours. Private, USDA, and SBA options available. No obligation, no fees to apply.

Request a Term Sheet +1 (727) 359-2495
Private Lending for Golf & Country Clubs

Golf Course Financing

We have owned, operated, and sold golf courses — which means we underwrite golf and hospitality assets with a level of insight that traditional lenders simply cannot match. Fast closings, flexible terms, nationwide.
Request a Term Sheet Call +1 (727) 359-2495
Why A&J Gulf Blvd Capital

Operators First.
Lenders Second.

Our principals previously owned and operated five golf courses and country clubs across Georgia — including properties that hosted the Forme Tour (PGA Tour Canada), served as a filming location for a major motion picture, and were recognized by Golf Inc. Magazine.

We purchased one of those properties in 2019 and sold it in 2024 for four times the initial investment. That firsthand experience is exactly why we can underwrite golf and hospitality assets that traditional banks routinely pass on.

When you bring us a golf course deal, you're not explaining the business to a credit committee that's never stood on a fairway. You're talking to principals who have.

Financing Solutions

Golf Course Loan Programs

We offer flexible private lending solutions for every stage of a golf course investment — from acquisition to renovation to bridge financing.

⛳

Acquisition Loans

Financing to purchase private, semi-private, or public golf courses. We move fast — often closing in 7 to 14 days when others take months.

  • ✓ Up to 75% LTV
  • ✓ $1M – $20M+
  • ✓ 12 – 36 month terms
🏗️

Renovation & Construction

Funding for course renovations, clubhouse upgrades, amenity additions, pool decks, dining facilities, or full ground-up construction.

  • ✓ Up to 80% LTC
  • ✓ Draw schedule available
  • ✓ 12 – 24 month terms
🔁

Bridge Loans

Short-term capital to stabilize operations, fund improvements ahead of a sale, or bridge the gap while transitioning to permanent financing.

  • ✓ Up to 75% LTV
  • ✓ 6 – 24 month terms
  • ✓ Interest only payments
Eligible Properties

Types of Golf Properties We Finance

We lend on all types of golf and country club assets across all 50 states.

🏌️

Private Golf Courses

Exclusive member-only clubs seeking acquisition or renovation capital.

🏡

Country Clubs

Full-service clubs with dining, tennis, fitness, and social amenities.

🌐

Semi-Private Courses

Hybrid models serving both members and daily-fee public players.

🎯

Public Golf Courses

Daily-fee courses with consistent patronage and revenue history.

🏢

Golf & Resort Properties

Destination resorts combining lodging, golf, and hospitality operations.

⛳

Driving Ranges & Practice Facilities

Standalone or attached practice facilities with proven revenue streams.

Common Questions

Golf Course Financing FAQ

What loan amounts are available for golf course financing?

We lend from $1 million up to $20 million and above. Loans are available for acquisition, renovation, bridge financing, and construction. We do not provide business-only financing — the loan must be secured by real property.

How quickly can you close a golf course loan?

We close in as fast as 7 to 14 days. As a private direct lender — not a broker — we control the process from term sheet to funding, which is how we move at a speed banks simply cannot match.

Do you lend on distressed or underperforming golf courses?

Yes. Unlike conventional lenders, we understand that a course's current financials may not reflect its true potential. We evaluate the asset, the market, and the business plan — not just trailing income. This is a key advantage of working with operators-turned-lenders.

What states do you lend in?

We lend in all 50 states. Golf course financing is available nationwide with no geographic restrictions.

Do you work with mortgage brokers on golf course deals?

Absolutely. We have a dedicated broker program with fee protection, fast term sheets, and direct access to our principals. Broker fees are agreed upon upfront and protected through closing.

Ready to Finance Your Golf Course?

Submit your deal today and receive a term sheet within 24 hours. No obligation, no fees to apply.
